alert.title: ErrorSpike: profile-svc unhandled exception
alert.body: profile-svc 500 errors climbing on GET /profile; single endpoint affected

signals.title: profile-svc stack trace
signals.body: NullPointerException: cannot read property 'displayName' of null at renderProfile() line 88

signals.title: profile-svc stack trace
signals.body: same NPE at renderProfile(); only triggered for users with no avatar set

signals.title: profile-svc error rate
signals.body: error rate on /profile only; other endpoints healthy

signals.title: Deploy profile-svc v4.0
signals.body: overnight deploy, but errors only started 14h later when a null-avatar user hit the page

ground_truth.root_cause: Unhandled null dereference in renderProfile() when a user has no avatar/displayName
acceptable_next_steps: Ship a hotfix adding a null guard in renderProfile()
Add a regression test for null-avatar users
